S.FORM: == qaling Pyanan == qaling Pyanan ga cyux maki squ puqing llyung na mnibu, kin wagiq kaybat nya ga qutuxn seng ru tzyul kbhul meta kin wagiq nya.
S.PHON: == qaliŋ pjanan == qaliŋ pjanan ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu puqiŋ lljuŋ na mniβu, kin waɣiq kajβat nja ɣa qutuxn s~ɕeŋ ru tzjul kβħul meta kin waɣiq nja.
S.FORM: == qaling Pyanan == qaling Pyanan ga cyux maki squ puqing llyung na mnibu, kin wagiq kaybat nya ga qutuxn seng ru tzyul kbhul meta kin wagiq nya.
S.PHON: == qaliŋ pjanan == qaliŋ pjanan ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu puqiŋ lljuŋ na mniβu, kin waɣiq kajβat nja ɣa qutuxn s~ɕeŋ ru tzjul kβħul meta kin waɣiq nja.
